message:
security(api): harden OG image proxy against open redirect attacks

Add comprehensive security measures to the OG image proxy endpoint:

- Validate URL protocol (only http/https allowed) before processing
- Implement manual redirect handling with domain allowlist enforcement
- Check each redirect hop against ALLOWED_DOMAINS to prevent redirect
  chains that escape to unauthorized domains
- Limit redirect chain depth to 3 hops to prevent infinite loops
- Extract fetch headers to shared constant for consistency

This prevents attackers from using the proxy as an open redirect by
crafting URLs that initially point to allowed domains but redirect
to malicious external sites. Each hop in a redirect chain now requires
the destination domain to be in the allowlist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
